title: Sia's Gift
description: A mod I made for my best friend! Adding ducks and a couple of her favorite foods
body:
<details>
<summary>Backstory</summary>

This mod was made as a gift to my good friend Oceania, whom I call Sia because her name is too long.

You can find her channel [here](https://www.youtube.com/@OceaniaGaming1) if you want to check it out!
</details>

This mod adds a few food items, which are as follows:

- Yorkshire pudding
- Raw/Cooked Bacon
- Raw/Cooked Sausage
- Pig in a Blanket
- Raw/Cooked Duck

It also adds the Duck! The Duck is a new mob that can be found spawning in river and beach biomes. They can be attracted and bred by using **Bread**. They drop some feathers and **Raw Duck** which can be cooked like any raw meat in a furnace or smoker.


<details>
<summary>Future plans</summary>

- Adding a Brachiosaurus mob(up next!)
- Adding a unicorn(women am i right?)
- Adding more refined animations and sounds for the duck.
- Making ducks tameable.

</details>
